verifier_scope: Review whether the database read-only query scenario includes query intent, approved scope, result-handling requirements, policy fingerprint, and execution receipt evidence.
unsupported_claims: live database permissions were enforced by this governance layer
data classification labels are independently correct
query result contains no sensitive data without external inspection
database state can be reconstructed without a dependency snapshot

verification_outcomes.PASS: Required database read-only review artifacts are present and internally consistent for MVP review.
verification_outcomes.FAIL: Required query scope, result handling, policy fingerprint, or receipt evidence is missing.
verification_outcomes.UNSUPPORTED: The review asks for live database enforcement proof, independent data classification accuracy, or dependency-state reconstruction outside the current boundary.
